text: {"is_complete": false, "next_step": {"type": "select", "prompt_text": "Welcome to deferment of studies (Cuti Bersebab). Deferment is only allowed for one of six recognised reasons under Reg. 41 — pick the one that matches your situation. Personal preference or 'gap year' are NOT recognised reasons.", "config": {"options": [{"value": "medical", "label": "Medical", "description": "Serious illness, surgery, mental health, hospitalisation. Requires Government Hospital MC (private GP MCs rejected)."}, {"value": "compassionate", "label": "Compassionate", "description": "Death of immediate family member, serious family emergency, full-time caregiver responsibility."}, {"value": "financial", "label": "Financial", "description": "Provable financial hardship preventing continued study (parent retrenchment, income loss)."}, {"value": "national_service", "label": "National service", "description": "Called up for PLKN, ATM, RELA Border, etc. Requires official deployment letter."}, {"value": "sport_religious", "label": "Sport / religious", "description": "Competitive sports representing the country, Haj, etc. Requires confirmation letter from relevant body."}, {"value": "other", "label": "Other", "description": "Reviewed case-by-case (e.g. maternity)."}]}}, "reasoning": "The 6 recognised reasons under Reg. 41 are the gating filter — Programme Coordinator will reject any application without one of these. The choice also determines which proof document is required.", "running_summary": "Student starting deferment application.", "citations": ["When Deferment Is Allowed"]}
